persona.description: A casual browser with low purchase intent who may leave if approached too strongly.

behavior_description: 0-2s: The shopper is near the display but keeps their body angled away from the aisle. 2-5s: The shopper avoids looking toward the service area and keeps attention low. 5-8s: The shopper looks away when someone might approach, maintaining distance from interaction. 8-10s: The shopper stays distant and avoids direct interaction.

behavior_timeline.event: The shopper is near the display but keeps their body angled away from the aisle.
The shopper avoids looking toward the service area and keeps attention low.
The shopper looks away when someone might approach, maintaining distance from interaction.
The shopper stays distant and avoids direct interaction.

kling_prompt_sections.camera: 10-second fixed in-store surveillance-style shot, slightly elevated oblique angle; customer body trajectory, dwell time, hand movement, product display, and counter area visible; face detail is helpful but not required; one primary shopper, natural movement, no subtitles, no voiceover, no brand logos.
kling_prompt_sections.scene: a quiet watch boutique with a glass display counter; visible product setup: two premium wristwatches on neutral display pads.

behavior_timeline.event: The shopper is near the display but keeps their body angled away from the aisle.
The shopper avoids looking toward the service area and keeps attention low.
The shopper looks away when someone might approach, maintaining distance from interaction.
The shopper stays distant and avoids direct interaction.

kling_prompt_sections.negative: no extreme overhead shot, no tiny distant customer, no occluded product area, no extra shoppers, no completed purchase, no salesperson speech, no exaggerated acting, no floating labels, no hidden-category labels, no intervention labels, no scoring text, no UI overlays.

kling_prompt:
Camera: 10-second fixed in-store surveillance-style shot, slightly elevated oblique angle; customer body trajectory, dwell time, hand movement, product display, and counter area visible; face detail is helpful but not required; one primary shopper, natural movement, no subtitles, no voiceover, no brand logos.
Scene: a quiet watch boutique with a glass display counter; visible product setup: two premium wristwatches on neutral display pads.
Customer behavior style: The shopper appears close to asking for help or making a concrete next move, but no purchase is completed.
Behavior timeline:
- 0-2s: The shopper is near the display but keeps their body angled away from the aisle.
- 2-5s: The shopper avoids looking toward the service area and keeps attention low.
- 5-8s: The shopper looks away when someone might approach, maintaining distance from interaction.
- 8-10s: The shopper stays distant and avoids direct interaction.
Negative constraints: no extreme overhead shot, no tiny distant customer, no occluded product area, no extra shoppers, no completed purchase, no salesperson speech, no exaggerated acting, no floating labels, no hidden-category labels, no intervention labels, no scoring text, no UI overlays.
